title: UKSSSC – Assistant Agriculture Officer, Fodder Assistant – 90 Posts
org: Assistant Agriculture Officer Class–1 (Development Branch, Non-Gazetted) / Assistant Agriculture Officer Class–3 / Fodder Assistant Group–3
shortInfo: The UKSSSC Recruitment 2026 notification has been released for a total of 90 Assistant Agriculture Officer, Fodder Assistant vacancies. The online application process will begin on 01 June 2026, and the last date to submit the application form is 21 June 2026.

basic_details.job_title: UKSSSC AAO Recruitment 2026 Notification Out - Apply Online for 90 Assistant Agriculture Officer, Fodder Assistant Posts
basic_details.short_information: The UKSSSC Recruitment 2026 notification has been released for a total of 90 Assistant Agriculture Officer, Fodder Assistant vacancies. The online application process will begin on 01 June 2026, and the last date to submit the application form is 21 June 2026.
basic_details.organization_name: Agriculture Department & Animal Husbandry Department, Uttarakhand
basic_details.post_name: Assistant Agriculture Officer Class–1 (Development Branch, Non-Gazetted) / Assistant Agriculture Officer Class–3 / Fodder Assistant Group–3

qualification.education_qualification: 1. Service in Territorial Army for minimum 2 years; OR 2. NCC "B" or "C" Certificate. For Post 3: Good knowledge of written Hindi in Devanagari script is also mandatory.

selection_process: Offline/Online Objective Type Multiple Choice Written Examination (100 marks, 02 hours)
how_to_apply: Candidates shall apply online only at www.sssc.uk.gov.in. No other mode of application will be accepted. No hard copy of the application or any document is to be sent to the Commission's office. Candidates are advised to apply well before the closing date and not wait until the last date.
seo_tags: Uttarakhand Subordinate Service Selection Commission Assistant Agriculture Officer
